message:
test(promise): expand from 59 to 80 tests for promise/future and spawn modules (wa-6g85m)

Add 21 new unit tests:
- lib.rs +11: BrokenPromise error source/downcast, ok-then-err overwrite, tuple/nested
  result/empty string types, zero value edge case, empty error message, future consumed
  becomes pending, drop future before resolve
- spawn.rs +10: block_on with bool/Option/Result/large computation, scoped executor
  string/error/sequential/nested tests, spawn_into_new_thread with bool/unit returns

Note: spawn tests require --test-threads=1 due to global scheduler state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
